description: Capex S.A., an integrated energy company, engages in the exploration and exploitation of hydrocarbons in Argentina. The company is involved in the exploration and exploitation of oil and gas; construction and development of a combined-cycle thermal power plant with an installed capacity of 672 MW and an LPG plant; production of hydrogen and oxygen; and production and sale of propane, butane, and gasoline, as well as generation of energy from wind farms and hydrogen/oxygen. It also processes and separates liquid gases derived from gas. The company was incorporated in 1988 and is based in Vicente López, Argentina. Capex S.A. is a subsidiary of Companias Asociadas Petroleras S.A.
